task: Deepen Day 1 curriculum and keep Day 0 UX structure

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence mapped to the user-visible issue and runtime verification before final reporting.
Code and UI changes require completion evidence guard and at least one user-facing or runtime entrypoint check.

changes: Day 1 now has five foundation concept cards covering safe AI use boundaries, sensitive-information removal, prompt shape, source verification, and parent-voice rewriting.
Day 1 schedule now totals 85 minutes across nine concrete practice blocks instead of a shallow three-step activity.
Day 1 completion now requires four saved outputs: sanitized input, first AI answer, source comparison check, and user-edited final result.
Day 1 active UX now follows the Day 0 structure: concept cards, comprehension checks, question textareas, course flow, mission, checklist, and result paste area.
The Day 1 preview card is shown only from Day 0; active Day 1 no longer looks like a future-training preview.
